positive: A majestic celestial forest silhouette, filled with bioluminescent flora and stylized constellations. Central composition featuring massive, stylized crescent moons entwined with luminous, deep sapphire nebulas. The foreground elements are crisp, clean jungle leaves and exotic, fantastical pitcher plants rendered in high-contrast black and rich teal, outlined with glowing gold filament. Style of neo-tribal etched line art mixed with modern cosmic wave graphics. Minimalist, highly graphic, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic, moody contrast. Ink bleed effect, detailed vector illustration.
negative: photorealism, logo, text, watermark, signature, copyright, blur, grain, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, fuzzy, low resolution
